protocol_action_not_executed: Protocol-specified follow-up action (e.g., order repeat labs) was not actually executed or ordered.
active_order_status_not_filtered: Did not filter MedicationRequest queries by active status, potentially missing or duplicating orders.
removal_order_created_without_removal_ch: Created a removal order for a device without first checking for an existing removal order.
insufficient_observation_window_for_aver: Averages are calculated or reported even when there are not enough observations in the required time window.
order_discontinuation_not_executed: Identified duplicate orders but did not actually discontinue the older/duplicate order.
observation_time_window_not_applied: Did not apply the correct time window when calculating averages from observations.
opioid_order_detection_false_negative: Failed to detect existing active opioid orders due to incomplete search or filtering.
vaccine_history_time_window_not_applied: Did not check vaccine history within the required time window before ordering.
covid_vaccine_code_mismatch: Queried COVID vaccine with incorrect code, missing valid records.
fhir_resource_wrong_field_extracted: Extracted the wrong field (e.g., Procedure date instead of last administration date) from the FHIR resource.
duplicate_order_check_omitted: Did not check for or discontinue duplicate DVT prophylaxis orders before creating a new one.
answer_format_wrong_type: Returned a MedicationRequest order when a ServiceRequest was expected, or vice versa.
patient_reference_format_incorrect: Patient reference in FHIR order is not in the correct 'Patient/{id}' format.
order_creation_action_omitted: Agent failed to create a new order when required by protocol.
